transcript: The Boy Wonder is about to enter the World Cup. Lionel Messi, the youngest Argentine player to play at a World Cup since 1934 Diego Maradona is a big fan of Messi that big banner said this is my dream Messi's on it's a dream for Argentina and if Serbia and Montenegro were worried about Tevez and Riquelme and Crespo they say Messi's in a different league Subtitles by the Amara.org community
